---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new capability, policy feature, or verification improvement
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What limitation or gap are you trying to address?

## Proposed change

Describe the behavior you want.

## Scope

State what should be in scope and out of scope.

## Evidence

Explain how we should verify the feature once implemented.

## User impact

Who benefits from this and what becomes easier or safer for them?
